title: heptapleurum yatesii
intro: Heptapleurum yatesii, also known as the Pigeon Wings plant, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Australia and New Guinea. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. The plant's leaves and stems are used in herbal preparations, which have been shown to provide health benefits such as relieving bronchitis and other respiratory problems, as well as reducing fever. In traditional medicine, Heptapleurum yatesii is often consumed as a tea or infusion, made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water.
